info.name: Fraud Detection Platform
info.description: Comprehensive Postman collection covering API Gateway, User, Transaction, Fraud, ML Scoring, Decision Engine, Human Verification, Appeal, Notification, Audit, Analytics, and Monitoring (Prometheus/Grafana) scenarios.

item.name: Get Decision By Transaction ID (Eventually Consistent)

exec: if (pm.response.code === 404) { console.log('Decision not ready yet. Retry in 2-5 seconds.'); }

item.name: Login with Old Password After Change (Expected 401)

exec: const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.success) { pm.collectionVariables.set('accessToken', json.data.accessToken); }

if (transactionId) { pm.collectionVariables.set('transactionId', transactionId); pm.collectionVariables.set('decisionTransactionId', transactionId); pm.environment.set('transactionId', transactionId); pm.environment.set('decisionTransactionId', transactionId); }
if (pm.response.code === 404) { console.log('Decision not persisted yet. Retry this request after a short delay.'); }
pm.test('review record available or pending', function(){ pm.expect([200,404]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
if (pm.response.code === 404) { console.log('Review record not yet queued. Retry after a short delay.'); }
pm.test('manual review accepted or not ready', function(){ pm.expect([200,404]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
console.log('Review record not found yet. Run "Get Review By High-Risk Transaction" then retry.');
pm.test('status reflects manual review or auto-decline path', function(){ pm.expect(['FLAGGED', expected, 'REJECTED']).to.include(json.data.status); });
if (json.data.status !== expected && json.data.status !== 'REJECTED') { console.log('Status not updated yet; retry this request in a few seconds.'); }
if (json.data.status === 'REJECTED') { console.log('Transaction may have been auto-declined before manual review.'); }
pm.test('manual decline accepted or not ready', function(){ pm.expect([200,404]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: Verify Transaction Status After DECLINED Review

exec: pm.test('declined maps to REJECTED eventually', function(){ pm.expect(['FLAGGED','REJECTED']).to.include(json.data.status); });
if (json.data.status !== 'REJECTED') { console.log('Status not REJECTED yet; retry this request in a few seconds.'); }
console.log('Transaction not yet in appeal-eligible status. Continue flow after decision settles.');
console.log('Appeal create returned', pm.response.code, '- may already exist or transaction not eligible yet.');
console.log('No appealId set yet. Run list customer appeals first.');
console.log('Resolve not completed; verify appealId and that appeal is still open.');
pm.test('status reflects appeal eventually', function(){ pm.expect([source, expected, 'FLAGGED', 'REJECTED', 'APPROVED']).to.include(json.data.status); });
console.log('Status not at expected final state yet. Retry after Kafka consumer catches up.');
